name: a3_dead_code
outcome_goal: Net-negative diff on public; every deleted symbol has grep evidence of zero callers recorded in the PR description.
verify_command: bash -lc "git diff --stat public..HEAD | tail -1 | rg 'deletions' >/dev/null && pytest -q && praxis workflow discover reindex --yes"

jobs.label: a3_dead_code
jobs.prompt: Hunt dead compatibility code and delete only symbols with grep/discover evidence of zero live callers. Targets: Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/__init__.py __getattr__; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/execution/__init__.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/workflow/__init__.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/unit/test_supervisor_compatibility.py; any file matching *_compat*, *_shim*, legacy_*. Standing order: unused shims before live facades, migrate callers before killing live facades. Do not preserve bad structure for compatibility theater. Required output: net-negative branch diff, PR description with symbol -> evidence command -> zero caller result, and bugs for any deletion blocked by live callers. Verify with pytest -q and praxis workflow discover reindex --yes.
jobs.verify_command: bash -lc "git diff --stat public..HEAD | tail -1 | rg 'deletions' >/dev/null && pytest -q && praxis workflow discover reindex --yes"
